title: Soulection White Label: 020
content:
Residing in Norwich Connecticut, our 20th White Label release comes from none other than Foisey. With a background in many genres and a love for classic samples, Foisey’s ability to blend together hand-picked samples with multi-layered, contemporary production creates a new sound that is both eclectic and raw. 

This 6-track project is smooth and sexy, yet head-nod worthy–having the ability to let you ride the wave of the rhythm, but at times pull you into the current, diving deep into the gyre of infused sounds and tempos. These tracks will want to make you listen over and over again, discovering new layers each time you listen.
